body.title: Fold design/open_questions/needs_review → triage (status model step 1)
body.description:
Step 1 of D-ticket-status-model-2026-06-16: collapse design/open_questions/needs_review into TRIAGE.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, queue_view.py, uuquestions.py, uushowticket.py, devices/web_server/server.py; DB clan.memories + devlab.tickets.
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (Postgres only), log-state-change (AR-009 — migration logged), test-plan.
**Scope boundary:** IN — fold the three intake statuses + migrate rows. OUT — approval/akien removal (step 2), ASSIGNED+shim-nag (step 3).
**Test plan:** py_compile all edited files; opentickets renders; actionable pool returns sprint, excludes design; 0 folding statuses remain in DB. All passed.
body.result: Shipped 2026-06-16. Code: cc_queue.py (STATUS_ORDER, _ACTIONABLE_STATUSES dropped design, emoji, _PREFIX_STATUS, legacy_map, cmd_needs_review, docstring), queue_view.py, web_server/server.py, uuquestions.py (rewritten), uushowticket.py. DB: T-scenario-generator design→triage (snapshot + AR-009 log). Verified: opentickets shows canonical labels, actionable pool intact, design no longer auto-claimable.
